channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 Trooped/QuickBars (223 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Trooped

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: oneroomlife

📝 Repository: oneroomlife/blyy

📄 Descrizione: 碧蓝语音是一款专为碧蓝航线玩家设计的语音播放器应用，提供优雅的界面和流畅的用户体验。用户可以浏览舰娘列表、收藏喜爱的角色、播放各种语音台词，并享受精美的视觉效果。

item.title: 📝 NicosNicolaou16/EyeDropper_API (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NicosNicolaou16

📝 Repository: NicosNicolaou16/EyeDropper_API

📄 Descrizione: This open-source project demonstrates the implementation of the Eye Dropper API in Android using Jetpack Compose. It allows users to precisely pick colors from any part of the screen or specific images, making it an essential tool for creative and design-oriented applications.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android android-application android17 api color-picker dragonball experimental eye-dropper eye-dropper-api jetpack-compose kotlin kotlin-android native-color-picker sample-app

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-28T19:59:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-05T23:27:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
